activeWork.description: Implement general install-path conflict detection for syllago install (--to-all and explicit multi-provider). Fix OpenCode DiscoveryPaths bug. Add GlobalSharedReadPaths field to Provider struct.

Two items ready for implementation: (1) OpenCode bug fix, (2) general conflict detection feature. Checks content type captured in bead syllago-sutjm for later.

opencodeBug.description: OpenCode DiscoveryPaths for Skills is missing .agents/skills/
opencodeBug.source: Verified: sst/opencode GitHub — packages/opencode/src/skill/index.ts. EXTERNAL_DIRS = [".claude", ".agents"] — OpenCode explicitly scans both globally and project-level.

conflictDetectionDesign.summary: General shared-path conflict detection for install command. Fires when multiple selected providers would result in the same skill being installed to paths that other providers also read — causing duplicate content and conflict warnings.
conflictDetectionDesign.keyInsight: Conflict detection must be GENERAL, not Gemini-specific. The issue applies to any provider whose GlobalSharedReadPaths overlap with another provider's InstallDir.

sharedPathReaders: Roo Code: also reads ~/.agents/skills/ globally (lowest priority)
OpenCode: also reads ~/.agents/skills/ globally (after bug fix)
notInConflict: Amp: uses ~/.config/agents/skills/ — DIFFERENT PATH, no conflict with Codex
Claude Code, Cline, Copilot CLI, Cursor, Kiro, Zed: no .agents/ usage at all

conflictDetectionDesign.contentTypeScope: .agents/ cross-provider convention is SKILLS ONLY. Confirmed from all provider source code — no .agents/rules/, .agents/mcp/, .agents/agents/, .agents/commands/ cross-provider paths exist. Amp has .agents/checks/ but that is Amp-exclusive, not shared.

proposedProviderStructChange.purpose: Global paths a provider reads BEYOND its own InstallDir. Distinct from DiscoveryPaths (project-scoped). Needed to detect install collisions.

conflictDetectionDesign.algorithm: 1. Resolve InstallDir for each selected provider+contentType. 2. Build map: installPath -> provider. 3. For each provider, check GlobalSharedReadPaths. 4. If any SharedReadPath matches another provider's InstallDir -> CONFLICT. Return list of conflicts with affected providers.
conflictResolutionOptions: Option 1: Shared path only — install once to ~/.agents/<type>/ (serves all providers that read it, no conflicts)
Option 2: Each provider's own canonical dir — Gemini gets ~/.gemini/skills/, etc. No shared path write.
Option 3: All paths — current behavior, may cause conflict warnings
conflictDetectionDesign.whenNoConflict: If Codex is NOT in the install set, no provider's InstallDir resolves to ~/.agents/skills/, conflict detection returns empty -> install proceeds silently without prompt.
conflictDetectionDesign.uxCLI: Pre-install warning + y/n prompt with three options (shared / canonical / all)

verifiedProviderPaths.note: All verified from official docs or source code. Full details in docs/research/agents-directory-cross-provider-research.md

checksContentType.status: Captured in bead, deferred. Decision needed on scope (Amp-only vs. prose analogues vs. full canonical format) before implementation.
checksContentType.format: Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Fields: name (required), description, severity-default (low|medium|high|critical), tools (array). Paths: .agents/checks/ (project), ~/.config/agents/checks/ or ~/.config/amp/checks/ (global).
checksContentType.finding: Amp-exclusive. No other provider has a structured checks format. Not a cross-provider shared path.

recentDecisions: Conflict detection must be GENERAL (not Gemini-specific) — applies to any provider whose GlobalSharedReadPaths overlap another provider's InstallDir
Scope is skills-only — confirmed .agents/ cross-provider convention does not extend to other content types
Amp is NOT in the conflict scenario — it uses ~/.config/agents/skills/ (XDG-style), not ~/.agents/skills/
New Provider struct field needed: GlobalSharedReadPaths (distinct from DiscoveryPaths which is project-scoped)
OpenCode has a confirmed bug: missing .agents/skills/ from DiscoveryPaths — fix before conflict detection work
Checks content type (Amp's .agents/checks/) captured as bead syllago-sutjm, deferred
nextSteps: Fix OpenCode bug: add .agents/skills/ to DiscoveryPaths in cli/internal/provider/opencode.go
Add GlobalSharedReadPaths field to Provider struct in cli/internal/provider/provider.go
Populate GlobalSharedReadPaths for Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Roo Code, OpenCode (Skills -> ~/.agents/skills/)
Implement conflict detection logic in cli/internal/installer/ — compare install paths against shared read paths
Add pre-install prompt in cli/cmd/syllago/install_cmd.go (3-option: shared / canonical / all)
Add TUI modal for conflict resolution in TUI install flow
Write tests for conflict detection logic and prompt behavior

context.notes: Research doc at docs/research/agents-directory-cross-provider-research.md has full source citations, per-provider path tables, conflict scenario explanation, and action items. All provider source code verified — not just docs. Amp manual is publicly accessible at https://ampcode.com/manual (not auth-gated despite previous research agent reporting otherwise). The benchmark-installer-implementation handoff is still in .handoffs/ — the canary verification (CARDINAL-ZEBRA-7742) was run this session and confirmed negative (Claude Code does not auto-load skills from ~/.agents/skills/).
